summary: Wrote round-1 GM business viability challenges for all 7 proposals. Scored Crewspace (OSS→Visual) at 7/10. Rejected FlowCrew (4/10), CrewEmbed (4/10), AgentBench (3/10), AgentOps (3/10), CrewMarket (2/10). Key revisions: Year 1 ARR revised to $100-200K (down from $358K+), enterprise revenue removed from Year 1, UX target reset to 'clean/professional' not 'Lovable-quality'. Three-agent convergence on OSS-first → visual platform is the strongest signal.
